title: Get Rights Request
description: Search for licensable rights across a brand agent's roster. Returns matches with pricing. Discovery is natural-language-first — no taxonomy for categories. The agent interprets intent from the query and filters based on the buyer's brand compatibility.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

query.description: Natural language description of desired rights. The agent interprets intent, budget signals, and compatibility from this text.

uses.description: Rights uses being requested. The agent returns options covering these uses, potentially bundled into composite pricing.

buyer_brand.description: The buyer's brand. The agent fetches the buyer's brand.json for compatibility filtering (e.g., dietary conflicts, competitor exclusions).

countries.description: Countries where rights are needed (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Filters to rights available in these markets.

brand_id.description: Search within a specific brand's rights. If omitted, searches across the agent's full roster.

right_type.description: Filter by type of rights (talent, music, stock_media, etc.)

include_excluded.description: Include filtered-out results in the excluded array with reasons. Defaults to false.

pagination.description: Pagination parameters for large result sets
